query:
now working on 469. here's the proposed fix, thoughts? ---                                                                               
  Root Cause:                                                                       
  Three guard sites in nli_detection_tick.rs encode is_empty() checks that block any
   Informs candidate where either entry lacks a feature_cycle. This conflates       
  intra-feature suppression (the design intent) with attribution completeness       
  enforcement (not in the spec).                                                    
                                                                                    
  Affected Files:                                                 
  - crates/unimatrix-server/src/services/nli_detection_tick.rs — three sites:
    - Line ~293: Phase 4b source pre-filter loop (if                                
  source_meta.feature_cycle.is_empty() { continue; }) — drops sources before HNSW
  scan                                                                              
    - Line 770: phase4b_candidate_passes_guards — || is_empty blocks pair if either 
  side is empty                                                                     
    - Line 801: apply_informs_composite_guard — needs consistency update            
                                                                        
  Proposed Fix:                                                                     
  1. Remove the pre-filter at line ~293 entirely — wrong place for this logic       
  2. Replace lines 770–778 (two separate if blocks) with single predicate: if       
  !src.is_empty() && !tgt.is_empty() && src == tgt { return false; }                
  3. Update Site 3 (line 801) to use (src.is_empty() || tgt.is_empty() || src !=    
  tgt) for the cross-feature allow condition — architect flagged that the negation
  form matters here to avoid an accidental inversion                                
  4. Update doc comment at line 747 and InformsCandidate field comment at line 83 to
   reflect relaxed semantics                                                        
  5. Add 4 AC-15 test cases: source-empty/target-non-empty → passes,                
  source-non-empty/target-empty → passes, both-empty → passes, same non-empty →
  blocked (existing covered)                                                        
                                                                  
  Design Review: APPROVED WITH NOTES                                                
                                                                                    
  Key architect findings:                                                           
  - (Non-blocking) Site 3's stated failure mode in the issue is inaccurate ("" != ""
   is false, so both-empty pairs actually pass Site 3 today) — the fix is still     
  correct, but the implementer must understand the real reason each site is touched
  - (Non-blocking) The single proposed new test is insufficient; 3 additional AC-15 
  variants needed                                                                  
  - (Non-blocking) Doc comments at lines 83 and 747 will mislead future agents if   
  not updated                                                                    
  - No hot-path risk, no security surface change — fix is purely in-memory on a     
  background tick

entries.title: Cross-feature guard over-restriction: is_empty() OR blocks entries with unknown provenance
Per-guard negative test for multi-predicate composite guards in NLI detection tick
ADR-005: No Config Toggle for Contradicts Suppression (col-030)
High Compile Cycles Signal Need for Targeted Test Invocations
